channel.title: Shreyas Korad — Writing
channel.description: Articles and insights on learning design, gamification, and L&D strategy.

item.title: Shared quests can strengthen academic teams
item.description: Teams care about the topic, but the surrounding systems still produce activity without durable capability, better decisions, or visible business impact.

item.title: Mechanics fail when motivation design is weak
item.description: Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.
